Hey, my name is


Mrityunjay Shrivastava

I'm a fullstack Web Developer with expertise in MERN stack, I know the in's and out of Kotlin and I love working on the backend. When I'm not coding, you'll probably find me watching sci-fi or playing football.
I am currently the CIO at Tangle, I am always on the lookout for new and exciting projects to tackle. If you're looking for a fullstack developer who loves to work on new things and can handle any challenge, then let's connect!

Tweet to @mjx

02. About Me -------------------------------------------------------------

I'm in my junior year pursuing B.Tech in Information Technology at Manipal University Jaipur (2020-2024).
Currently I am the CIO at Tangle, and i oversee everything related to tech here.

I'm also the Vice-Chairperson at MUJ ACM SIGBED, which is the only ACM Special Interest Group for Embedded Systems in India and I engage actively in the tech community to help others and learn from them as well.

Here are a few technologies I've been working with recently:

  • Node.js
  • Express
  • Tailwind
  • MongoDB
  • MySQL
  • Firebase
  • Postman
  • Javascript
  • C++

04. What's next?

Get In Touch

I am currently looking for opportunities based on blockchain or back-end development in JS, or anything innovative in general. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!

Jaipur, Rajasthan
